raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California currently distinguishes 'spousal rape' from 'rape', despite marital rape being illegal in all 50 states.",
    "According to the National Coalition Against Domestic Violence, between 10-14% of married women have been or may experience rape by their spouse.",
    "18% of spousal rape victims report that their children have witnessed the rape.",
    "Until 1975, every state in the U.S. exempted marital rape from their ordinary rape laws.",
    "The penalties for spousal rape in California are less severe than for non-spousal rape.",
    "A person convicted of non-spousal rape must register as a sex offender, whereas a person convicted of spousal rape only must register if force or violence was involved.",
    "Defendants accused of non-spousal rape of an unconscious person cannot plea bargain, while those accused of spousal rape can if they are married to the victim."
  ]
}
```
